revisedPrompt:
Generate exactly one PNG image for a game-development pixel-art asset.

Canvas and sheet requirements:
- Exact image size: 128x96 px.
- One frame only: 1 row x 1 column, frame size 128x96 px.
- Background must be solid #FF00FF chroma-key magenta filling all empty space, with no gradients, no texture, no transparency.
- No cell separator lines, grid lines, borders, labels, text, frame numbers, UI, signatures, or watermarks.
- Keep clear solid magenta margin between the object and every canvas edge.

Subject:
- ONE Japanese watermill hut, suisha-goya, as a single coherent pixel-art field prop.
- Three-quarter front view, filling most of the canvas while preserving margin.
- Small wooden hut with a thick thatched roof, stone base, and a LARGE dark-wood water wheel with readable paddles mounted on one side.
- It must clearly be a watermill hut, NOT a windmill.
- Draw it as one authored object, not repeated tile stamps; it may later be sliced into 16x16 engine tiles but should read as one building.

Style:
- SNES / SFC-era 16-bit pixel-art field prop, profile snes16_platformer_v1.
- Crisp low-resolution pixels, no anti-aliasing blur, no painterly smoothing.
- Fine readable pixel clusters, consistent palette, one-pixel dark outline where useful.
- Top-left light source.
- Bright mythical-Japan satoyama palette: deep rich saturated early-summer greens around rice-field banks, clear blue-green water accents, vermilion and white accents, soft warm sunlight.
- Not dry, not yellow-brown, not western prairie, not wasteland, not dark or gloomy.

Large-object quality:
- Break rectangular silhouettes with roof overhangs, uneven eaves, chimney or vent detail, trim, windows, door detail, varied roof and wall texture, subtle dirt and shadow.
- Add a soft contact shadow under the hut and wheel.
- Include small readable environmental details such as stones, moss, grass tufts, or a short water channel only if attached to the main object and not detached fragments.
- Preserve a clean readable collision footprint.

Cleanliness and restrictions:
- No detached fragments, isolated pixel islands, random dust specks, seam slivers, or leftover effect residue.
- No modern objects, no weapons, no samurai/ninja armor or helmets, no companion creature or birds.
- Avoid any recognizable existing game, anime, manga, or brand characters, logos, mascots, emblems, or likenesses.

Output should be one crisp high-resolution-looking 16-bit-style pixel-art PNG asset on a solid #FF00FF magenta background.
